name: দিনাজপুরের রসালো লিচু / Fresh Dinajpur Lychee 100pcs
desc: Handpicked fresh, juicy, and sweet Lychees straight from the famous orchards of Dinajpur. 100% chemical-free.

name: সাগর কলা / Fresh Sagar Banana 1 Dozen
desc: Naturally ripened Sagar Banana, full of nutrition and energy. Grown organically without any harmful chemicals.

name: হিমসাগর আম / Himsagar Mango 10kg
desc: The king of mangoes! Extremely sweet and fiberless Himsagar mangoes from Dinajpur. 100% formalin-free.

name: পাকা পেঁপে / Ripe Papaya 1pc
desc: Farm-fresh naturally ripened sweet papaya. Great for digestion and packed with essential vitamins.

name: মিষ্টি বরই / Sweet Jujube 1kg
desc: Crunchy and sweet local Jujube (Boroi/Kul) directly harvested from our registered farms.

name: ঐতিহ্যবাহী শিদল / Traditional Shidol 500g
desc: Authentic homemade Shidol from the northern region. Prepared with the highest hygiene and traditional recipes.

name: দেশি চিড়া / Beaten Rice (Chira) 1kg
desc: Premium quality deshi Chira (Beaten Rice), perfect for a healthy breakfast or evening snack. Clean and crispy.

name: মচমচে পাপড় / Crispy Papad 1 Pkt
desc: Delicious handmade crispy Papad. Fry or roast them for the perfect crunchy accompaniment to your meals.

name: কাটারিভোগ সুগন্ধী চাল / Kataribhog Rice 5kg
desc: Famous Dinajpur Kataribhog aromatic rice. Perfect for Biryani, Pulao, and Payesh. 100% pure and unadulterated.

name: ল্যাংড়া আম / Langra Mango 10kg
desc: Deliciously sweet and juicy Langra mangoes. Carefully handpicked from our best orchards in Dinajpur.

name: বোম্বাই লিচু / Bombay Lychee 100pcs
desc: Large, fleshy, and highly sweet Bombay Lychees. A true summer delight with a thin seed and thick pulp.

name: সবরি কলা / Sabri Banana 1 Dozen
desc: Premium quality Sabri banana. Naturally sweet, dense, and full of potassium. A perfect everyday healthy snack.

name: কাঁচা পেঁপে / Green Papaya 1kg
desc: Fresh green papaya, excellent for cooking healthy curries or making fresh salads. Grown without pesticides.

name: আপেল কুল / Apple Kul (Jujube) 1kg
desc: Large, crisp, and sweet Apple Kul. Tastes almost like a miniature apple. A fantastic healthy snack for all ages.

name: চিনিগুঁড়া সুগন্ধী চাল / Chinigura Rice 5kg
desc: Premium Chinigura aromatic rice. Small-grained, highly fragrant rice ideal for traditional Bengali festivals.
